persona: P3 老板式甩需求 (one-shot 1100+ char dump, then '上面说了')
verdict_rationale: Session terminated at T3 with termination_reason=user_input_unparseable_no_spec and spec_capsule_cid=null. T1 (the 808-char dump containing all 7 slot signals: job/anchor/memory/first_run/robustness/scope/acceptance/mirror) only advanced covered_slots from ['job'] to ['job'] (no new slots extracted) with confidence climbing 0.10 -> 0.15. The Meta extractor failed to pull anchor (Next.js+FastAPI+Postgres+SiliconFlow), memory (organization->user->template->contract_instance->review_run), first_run (admin uploads 5-10 templates -> chunk -> placeholders), robustness (daily offsite Postgres backup, 60s timeout, 2 retries), scope (50 concurrent lawyers, 200 reviews/month, no e-sign), acceptance (3 firms x 2 months, >=80% retention, >=1.5 issues, <=30% FP rate), or mirror (the explicit '7 slot 复述' request). Subsequent '上面说了' answers were triaged as non-relevant: T2 returned empty covered/open arrays with confidence 0.0 (predicate-failed bounce, same question repeated) and T3 hit the non_relevant ceiling and force-terminated without spec synthesis.

critical_metrics.subsequent_redundant_question_note: T2 repeated the verbatim T1 question after '上面说了'; T3 force-terminated before another question could be re-asked
critical_metrics.triage_class_on_shang_mian_shuo_le: non_relevant (both T2 and T3 produced empty-zero covered/open with confidence=0.0 and question_text unchanged; T3 then crossed the non_relevant ceiling -> terminated with user_input_unparseable_no_spec)

narrative: P3 hard variant cleanly exposes the F6-era extractor ceiling: an 808-char Chinese spec dump containing every canonical slot signal advances coverage by zero (confidence delta only +0.05) and the system asks again as if the user said nothing. When the boss-persona responds with the canonical '上面说了' deferral, the Meta-triage classifies it as off_topic / non_relevant rather than 'see prior turn', returns an empty-zero bounce, and the second '上面说了' tips the non_relevant counter over the ceiling -> termination_reason=user_input_unparseable_no_spec with no spec capsule. This is a clean reproduction of the predicted Research-A P3 failure mode: single-shot LLM extractor under-coverage cascading into terminate-without-spec when the user refuses to re-explain. Universality gap: the grill assumes per-slot one-question-one-answer cooperation; verbose front-loaded specs that bury multiple slots in one turn are silently dropped, and the off_topic predicate has no 'refer-back-to-prior-turn' branch.
